title: Camelliate
description: Adds the Caxton 0.3.0 April Fool’s prank to Minecraft.
body:
Brings back the April Fool’s prank present in Caxton versions 0.2.1 to 0.3.0, obfuscating all text with the substitution cipher used in the song [*Shingetsu ga Shiroku Maruku Kagayaite iru Yoru ni*][song] by Camellia.

[song]: https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm15572050
